Package neqsim.process.safety.compliance

Class StandardsComplianceReport

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.compliance.StandardsComplianceReport
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class StandardsComplianceReport extends Object implements Serializable
Standards Compliance Report — produces an auditable checklist of mandatory requirements from the major process-safety standards and tracks the project's compliance status.

Built-in checklists are provided for:

  • API RP 14C — Safety analysis of surface safety systems for offshore production
  • NORSOK S-001 — Technical safety
  • IEC 61511 — Functional safety: SIS for the process industry
  • STS0131 — Technical safety requirements
  • TR1965 — Gas scrubber/separator requirements
  • NORSOK P-002 — Process system line sizing
  • TR2237 — Performance standard structure
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

    • StandardsComplianceReport

      public StandardsComplianceReport(String projectName)
      Construct a compliance report.

  • Method Details

    • addRequirement

      public StandardsComplianceReport addRequirement(String standard, String clause, String description)
      Add a requirement.
      Parameters:
      standard - standard ID (e.g. "API RP 14C")
      clause - clause / section reference
      description - requirement description
      Returns:
      this report for chaining

    • setStatus

      public StandardsComplianceReport setStatus(String standard, String clause, StandardsComplianceReport.Status status, String evidence)
      Set status of an existing requirement (matched by standard + clause).
      Parameters:
      standard - standard ID
      clause - clause reference
      status - status
      evidence - supporting evidence text (document ref, calc ID)
      Returns:
      this report for chaining

    • getRequirements

      public List<StandardsComplianceReport.Requirement> getRequirements()
      Returns:
      immutable list of all requirements

    • compliancePercent

      public double compliancePercent()
      Compliance percentage (compliant / (total − N/A − not-assessed)).
      Returns:
      compliance percentage in [0, 100]

    • statusSummary

      public Map<StandardsComplianceReport.Status,Integer> statusSummary()
      Count requirements by status.
      Returns:
      map status → count (in declaration order)

    • report

      public String report()
      Build a multi-line text report.
      Returns:
      human-readable compliance report
